news.summary: Stocks decreased following President Trump's announcement of potential tariffs on the European Union, impacting the stock market. Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a decrease, but losses were reduced as nuclear stocks surged due to a White House executive order. Live coverage reported on this development in the stock market, with the details available on Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow rebounds after Trump threatens EU tariffs; nuclear stocks surge. Market updates on Investor's Business Daily.
Trump said Friday that U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel will form a “partnership,” after the Japanese steelmaker’s bid to acquire its U.S. rival had been blocked on national security grounds. -- CNBC

news.summary: Vivek Raman and Danny Ryan, co-founders of Etherealize, recently shared insights with Decrypt reporter André Beganski about the future of Ethereum. They discussed key aspects such as tokenization, institutional adoption, and the changing economics of the network. Raman and Ryan believe that Ethereum is on track to serve as the primary global settlement layer for Wall Street. Their discussion emphasized the platform's potential significance in these areas, highlighting the increasing importance of Ethereum in the financial world.
news.headline: Vivek Raman and Danny Ryan discuss Ethereum's potential as Wall Street's tokenization leader with Decrypt.

news.summary: In recent statistics, a total of 2,500 individuals were reported to have tested positive for the virus, with 150 new cases emerging in just the past 24 hours. Health officials also confirmed a significant increase in hospitalizations, with 300 people currently being treated for the virus. Furthermore, 20 new deaths were recorded, bringing the total number of fatalities to 150 since the outbreak began. Authorities have emphasized the importance of following safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: First union certification at Whole Foods by US for Amazon's grocery chain, a significant milestone.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Frank Boulben, the Chief Revenue Officer for the Consumer Group at Verizon (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ), is set to address the Cowen Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on May 28 at 10:15 a.m. ET. The speech will be livestreamed, and details on how to access it can be found on Verizon's Investor Relations page at www.verizon.com/about/investors.
news.headline: Verizon's Frank Boulben to speak at Cowen TMT Conference on May 28 at 10:15 am ET. Website for webcast info.

news.summary: Los Angeles, May 23, 2025 - Shoppers are in for a treat with the chance to grab exclusive discounts on high-end designer home furnishings as HD Buttercup, a well-known furniture store in Southern California, is shutting down after twenty years of operation. The store will be liquidating all its stock, offering customers a one-time opportunity to purchase top-tier items at reduced prices. This event marks a significant milestone for the store, which has been a go-to destination for furniture enthusiasts in the region. The closure sale is expected to attract a large number of customers aiming to take advantage of the unique deals before the store officially closes its doors.
news.headline: HD Buttercup, a prominent furniture store in Southern California, is closing after 20 years, offering final liquidation sale with significant discounts.

news.summary: In Warren, N.J., on May 23, 2025, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN) announced plans to extend the target demographic of TVGN 489 to now encompass individuals aged 65 and above. Previously noted in October 2024, the initial revenue outlook for the specialty care lineup stood at around $1 billion for its inaugural year, with a cumulative estimation over five years ranging from $18 billion to $22 billion. This expansion initiative is intended to widen the market opportunities for Tevogen's specialized pharmaceuticals. An updated financial projection, along with the risk adjusted net present value (rNPV), will be disclosed to account for the incorporation of the 65+ patient group.
news.headline: Tevogen Bio to include patients 65+ in specialty care pipeline, aiming for $1 billion launch-year revenue; 5-year estimates $18-22 billion.

news.summary: On Saturday, May 24, 2025, at 12:00 PM, a celebratory event will take place at Publix Field at Joker Marchant Stadium in Lakeland, FL. The event is open to the public with free admission. The occasion commemorates the 50th birthday of NFL icon Ray Lewis. The gathering is designed to celebrate love, wellness, and the unity of the community.
news.headline: NFL legend Ray Lewis hosts "52 Ways of Love" event in Lakeland, FL on May 24, 2025 at Publix Field, celebrating love, wellness & unity. Free admission.

news.summary: The most recent Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) Emotional Footprint Report by Info-Tech Research Group showcases top SIEM solutions boosting threat detection, enhancing incident response, and facilitating security team cooperation. The study reveals significant insights into the sector's performance. It is a valuable resource for companies seeking to bolster their cybersecurity defenses.
news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group ranks top SIEM platforms in 2025 report, highlighting solutions for threat detection and incident response.

news.summary: Data indicates that most of the largest holders of Trump meme coins acquired their positions during Thursday's cryptocurrency dinner and subsequently sold or transferred their coins.
news.headline: Majority of top Trump meme coin holders who attended crypto dinner sold or transferred their coins, per data.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that approximately 500 individuals were affected by the recent data breach. The breach exposed sensitive information of customers, including email addresses, phone numbers, and account details. The company has assured that they are taking necessary steps to enhance their data security measures to prevent such incidents in the future. Authorities have been notified about the breach, and an investigation is currently ongoing to determine the source and extent of the breach. Customers are advised to monitor their accounts and report any suspicious activity immediately.
news.headline: First union certified at Whole Foods by US, owned by Amazon, making a significant milestone in grocery industry.
CFTC Positions in the Week Ended May 20th

news.summary: The article discusses the increasing number of crypto ETFs listed on U.S. exchanges, leading to a difficult decision-making process for investors due to the complexity and variety of available options. Different types of Bitcoin ETFs offer exposure to cryptocurrencies without the need for handling exchanges and wallets, but their structures differ significantly, affecting performance in portfolios. For example, spot Bitcoin ETFs like iShares Bitcoin Trust offer direct Bitcoin exposure in a regulated format with features like low turnover, tight price tracking, and minimal capital gains distributions. This complexity in the ETF landscape highlights the importance of understanding the structure and workings of each investment, as it can impact returns, volatility, fees, and taxes. It emphasizes the significance of knowing what one owns and how it operates when entering the ETF market.
news.headline: Summary: As the number of crypto ETFs rise, investors face a complex choice. Structures of ETFs impact returns, volatility, fees, and taxes. Understanding these differences is crucial when navigating the crowded ETF space. Bitcoin ETFs offer exposure to crypto without hassle, but each type is constructed differently and may affect portfolio performance. Spot ETFs like iShares Bitcoin Trust offer direct Bitcoin exposure with low turnover and minimal tax implications.
US STEEL SHARES JUMP 16% AFTER RESUMING, HALTED AGAIN

news.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee on May 23, 2025, Avèro Advisors, an established independent consulting firm known for public sector transformation, shared that it secured a contract with Tarrant County, Texas. The contract involves offering advisory services on Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP). This partnership signifies a significant achievement for Avèro Advisors, as it strengthens their reputation in this field. This collaboration highlights Tarrant County's commitment to enhancing their systems, with Avèro Advisors bringing their expertise to the table.
news.headline: Tarrant County, Texas hires Avèro Advisors for ERP assessment and strategic planning. May 23, 2025.

news.summary: On Friday, President Donald Trump signed executive orders to bolster the nuclear energy industry, causing stocks of Oklo and S&P 500 giants to rise. The move was aimed at supporting the sector and had a positive impact on the market, with Oklo and S&P 500 companies experiencing an increase in stock prices following the announcement.
news.headline: Trump signs executive orders to support nuclear energy sector, boosting Oklo and S&P 500 giants.

news.summary: Seagate Technology has observed its Relative Strength Rating exceed 80, indicating a notable increase in strength. This update in the company's RS Rating marks a significant milestone for Seagate Technology's stock performance.
news.headline: Seagate Technology's Relative Strength Rating reaches over 80 level, indicating improvement. Stock upgrade noted.

news.summary: Par Pacific Holdings has recently experienced an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a boost in its technical performance. This upgrade signifies positive movement in the stock's overall market performance. The company's improved rating reflects its strengthening position in the market, with investors taking notice of its potential. This development suggests that Par Pacific Holdings may be a promising investment opportunity for those looking to capitalize on its recent advancements.
news.headline: Par Pacific Holdings receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade indicating improved technical performance.

news.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. reported a first-quarter revenue of $1.73 billion, a 4.2% increase from the same quarter last year, exceeding Wall Street's estimate of $1.67 billion. GAAP earnings per share were $1.85, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.77. The company maintains its fiscal 2025 outlook despite higher costs from tariffs. Williams-Sonoma anticipates fiscal 2025 net revenue to range between -1.5% and +1.5%, with comparable sales flat to up 3.0%. Analyst Steven Shemesh reduced the price forecast to $182 from $189 while maintaining an Outperform rating. The decrease was influenced by concerns over a 220 basis point headwind in merchandising gross margin, which Shemesh believes is temporary. The company's guidance may be revised if material changes occur due to future tariffs.
news.headline: Williams-Sonoma saw a 4.2% increase in revenue ($1.73 billion) & beat earnings estimates ($1.85 EPS). Analyst sees over 50% upside on housing rebound hopes with price forecast of $182. Retailer maintains fiscal 2025 outlook despite absorbing higher costs. Tariff landscape and uncertain future tariffs may affect guidance. Flat to 3.0% comp sales expected for fiscal 2025. Investor concerns over merchandising gross margin. RBC Capital Markets analyst maintains Outperform rating.
Monday FX Option Expiries

news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are down due to macroeconomic tensions spurred by a fresh tariff threat from President Trump. Bitcoin dropped 2.5% to $108,866.35, Ethereum decreased by 3.7% to $2,565.30, while Solana only saw a slight increase of 0.04% to $179.62. XRP fell by 2.91% to $2.36, Dogecoin slid 3.2% to $0.2345, and Shiba Inu dropped 3.8% to $0.00001477. Transaction volume surged by 26.2%, with active addresses growing by 5.75%. Transactions over $100,000 rose from 14,030 to 16,506 in a day, while exchange netflows declined by 51.8%. Coinglass data indicates 161,179 traders were liquidated in a day, totaling $563.57 million. Solana surged due to an R3 partnership, and a SOL-DOGE bridge was introduced. Pantera CEO foresees a rise in crypto IPOs with positive US regulation. Additionally, a US Congressman bought Bitcoin, Solana, and XRP in December but did not hold onto them. This story and more insights are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency market prices drop due to tariff threats by Trump; Bitcoin at $108,866.35 -2.5%, Ethereum at $2,565.30 -3.7%, XRP at $2.36 -2.91%, Dogecoin at $0.2345 -3.2%. Transaction volume up by 26.2%, active addresses by 5.75%, >$100,000 transactions at 16,506. 161,179 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $563.57 million. Solana rallies with R3 partnership, Pantera CEO predicts more Crypto IPOs, Congressman buys Bitcoin, Solana, XRP in Dec.

news.summary: Semler Scientific, listed on the Nasdaq, recently disclosed possession of approximately $466 million in Bitcoin. However, the company is currently under investigation by a legal firm.
news.headline: Semler Scientific, a Nasdaq-listed company, increases its Bitcoin holdings to $466 million amidst legal scrutiny.

news.summary: Short-term Bitcoin holders have realized $11.6 billion in profit over the past 30 days, signaling a potential pause or local top in the market. This profit follows a surge in Bitcoin's price to an all-time high of $111,800. Glassnode data shows a significant increase in profit-taking by short-term holders, potentially pointing to a market "breather". The STH Realized Profit/Loss Ratio has spiked, with profits outweighing losses. Technical indicators suggest cooling momentum as retail investor sentiment falls. Bitcoin's 30-day price momentum has slowed by 38%, indicating a "technical cooldown". Open interest is at a 90-day high with high liquidity and potential volatility. Bitcoin open interest dropped by $1.2 billion as prices fell. The market experienced a sharp decline due to global uncertainty triggered by US President Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on EU imports. Despite the sell-off, Bitcoin rebounded above $109,000, with speculators viewing corrections as potential buying opportunities. Investors are advised to conduct their own research before making decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin traders realize $11.6B in profit, predicting market pause or local top. Technical indicators show cooling momentum amid falling sentiment & high liquidity, with profit-taking indicating potential slowdown. Bitcoin price hit $111,800, but recent profit surge may halt bullish run. Market cooldown expected before potential rally. Trading caution advised as retail sentiment falls, open interest high. Bitcoin open interest drops $1.2B as price dips under $110,000 due to US-EU tariff announcement. Dip seen as buying opportunity. No investment advice given.

news.summary: Yesterday, a group of Jewish students from George Washington University (GWU) took legal action under Title VI, claiming a hostile educational environment. The rise in antisemitism on college campuses follows the October 7 terror attack.
news.headline: Jewish students file Title VI action against GWU citing hostile environment due to surge in antisemitism.

news.summary: A mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, Generational Group, has successfully facilitated the sale of Elarasys Worldwide, LLC and IT Hardware Plus, LLC to Aker Business, Inc. The transaction was finalized on May 6, 2025. Elarasys Worldwide, LLC, based in Elgin, Illinois, is known for its IT hardware and services tailored for data centers and enterprises, providing cost-effective solutions. This strategic acquisition marks a significant development in the IT industry, with key players now operating under Aker Business, Inc. based on the latest data.Character count: 365
news.headline: Generational Group advises sale of Elarasys Worldwide, LLC and IT Hardware Plus, LLC to Aker Business, Inc, closed May 6, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global poverty rate has seen a significant drop, with over 1 billion people escaping extreme poverty in the past two decades. The current global poverty rate stands at 9.2%, down from 36% in 1990. Despite this progress, approximately 689 million people still live in extreme poverty, surviving on less than $1.90 a day. Sub-Saharan Africa remains the region with the highest poverty rate, with 23.1% of the population living in extreme poverty. The report also highlights that poverty reduction efforts need to be accelerated in order to achieve the goal of ending extreme poverty by 2030, as set by the United Nations.
news.headline: Germany has proposed a new "exile campus" for Harvard following Trump's move.

news.summary: A new report states that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in two years. The economy added 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations. This brings the total number of jobs created this year to 1.5 million. The report also shows that wages have increased by 3% compared to last year. Overall, the labor market seems to be strong and steadily improving.
news.headline: Tether diverts attention as US aims to regulate stablecoins, amid rising concerns.

news.summary: Peak Technology, based in San Jose, has recently acquired Jinxbot 3D Printing, a well-known additive manufacturing company. Jinxbot is recognized for its rapid-turn prototyping services and engineering support in various industries. Founded by Jason Reynolds, the company has gained popularity for its innovative solutions in Silicon Valley. Peak Technology specializes in providing prototyping and manufacturing solutions for Semiconductor, Bio-Medical, Aerospace, and Deep Tech sectors. The acquisition of Jinxbot aims to enhance Peak Technology's offerings and further establish its presence in the market.
news.headline: Peak Technology acquired Jinxbot 3D Printing, enhancing additive manufacturing capabilities for OEMs. Key sectors include Semiconductor, Bio-Medical, Aerospace, and Deep Tech. Jinxbot renowned for high-mix, rapid-turn prototyping services. Acquisition led by Jason Reynolds.

news.summary: The P.E.L.O.S.I. Act proposed by Benzinga focuses on banning members of Congress from trading stocks, options, and ETFs, but does not mention cryptocurrency. A reader poll revealed that 48% believe Congress should not invest in cryptocurrencies, 30% support investing with disclosure, 15% prefer investing in cryptocurrencies through ETFs, and 8% believe Congress shouldn't disclose their crypto investments. The poll also found that owning cryptocurrency could affect confidence in Congress members' financial decisions. Overall, the poll captured varied opinions on Congressional cryptocurrency investments.
news.headline: 48% of voters believe members of Congress shouldn't invest in cryptocurrencies. 30% say they can if they disclose.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on May 23, 2025, the Propane Council of Texas (ProCOT) is urging Texans to prepare their propane grills for the start of the summer grilling season over Memorial Day weekend. As the season begins, it is important for backyard chefs to ensure their grills are in optimal condition and review safe grilling practices.
news.headline: ProCOT in Texas urges grillers to prepare for Memorial Day weekend, kickstarting grilling season.
White House: Any announcements on US Steel will come from Trump.

news.summary: The new restaurant, Farmhouse at Descanso Gardens, is set to offer fresh, seasonal dining in Southern California's famous 150-acre botanical garden located in LA CAÑADA FLINTRIDGE. Spearheaded by Chef Rich Mead, this establishment aims to bring a farm-to-table experience to visitors. The venture opens its doors on May 23, 2025, marking a significant addition to the culinary scene in the area. The restaurant promises to provide a unique dining experience amidst the natural beauty of the gardens, catering to both locals and tourists alike.
news.headline: Farmhouse at Descanso Gardens opening on May 30, 2025, 150-acre botanical garden in California, offering farm-to-table experience.
